candidate_authorities.name: repo_package_g2_v
candidate_authorities.rejection: package g_2(v) is tied to plaquette/R_conn/running/observed-comparison authority forbidden as PR230 proof input

candidate_authorities.name: bare_geometry_g2_squared_one_quarter
candidate_authorities.rejection: bare g2^2=1/4 does not by itself certify the PR230 low-scale physical g2 without an allowed running/matching bridge

candidate_authorities.name: su2_generator_casimir_normalization
candidate_authorities.rejection: SU(2) generator normalization and Casimir values fix representation charges, not the physical g2 coefficient

candidate_authorities.name: w_mass_same_surface_probe
candidate_authorities.rejection: W-mass companion reuses the existing EW g2 lane and observed-context comparisons; it is not independent g2 authority

candidate_authorities.name: response_only_self_normalization
candidate_authorities.rejection: response-only top/W/Z rows determine ratios, not absolute g2

candidate_authorities.name: bare_to_low_scale_running_bridge
candidate_authorities.rejection: bare/structural g2 plus beta-function running still needs same-source EW action, scale ratio, thresholds, and finite matching

exact_next_action: Build a real allowed authority path for g2, e.g. a non-plaquette absolute EW normalization theorem or a strict measurement/certificate that satisfies the required future fields, then rerun the W/Z mass-fit response-row builder and full PR230 assembly gate.
